content:
# ACP Support - Agent Client Protocol

## Overview

OpenCode supports the Agent Client Protocol (ACP), a standard protocol for AI agent integration with development tools.

## Usage

Use the `opencode acp` command to interact with ACP features.

## Configure for IDEs

### Zed
Configure ACP in Zed settings to use OpenCode as the AI agent backend.

### JetBrains IDEs
Configure ACP in JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ, WebStorm, etc.) to integrate with OpenCode.

### Avante.nvim
Configure ACP with Avante.nvim for Neovim integration.

### CodeCompanion.nvim
Configure ACP with CodeCompanion.nvim for Neovim integration.

## Supported Features

ACP supports various features depending on the client:
- Session management
- Code context sharing
- File editing
- Terminal command execution
- Agent communication
